summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish 155-mm self-propelled howitzer "AHS Krab" in the Kharkiv region using an optical fiber FPV drone "Provod." Interceptor drones are now a key element of Ukraine's short-range air defense, with mobile fire groups and interceptor drones highly valued for countering Russian "Geran" drones. On March 7, 2026, Rubikon Center operators conducted strikes on Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction, destroying 88 targets using FPV air defense against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs.
